name: Dllhost Outbound Network Connection
notes: This rule detects outbound connections initiated by dllhost.exe.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES 'dllhost\.exe' AQL filter query
when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true
when the event matches Destination IP is any of [10.0.0.0/8 or 127.0.0.0/8 or 169.254.0.0/16 or 172.16.0.0/12 or 192.168.0.0/16 or 20.184.0.0/13 or 51.103.210.0/23]
TD_list: APPLY Dllhost Outbound Network Connection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") MATCHES 'dllhost\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true
RED_list: Event name: Dllhost Outbound Network Connection
Event description: Detects outbound connections initiated by dllhost.exe
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
